title: callai
name: Alarm name
retryHint: Retries up to 3 times with the selected interval
saveSuccess: Alarm set! We'll keep your AI window fresh.
emptyHint: Tap the + button to create one.
ERR_INVALID_NAME: Please give the alarm a name.
ERR_INVALID_BINARY: Please choose a binary to run.
ERR_BINARY_NOT_FOUND: We couldn't find that command on this machine.
ERR_ALARM_BUSY: This alarm is busy. Try again when it finishes.
ERR_EXECUTION_FAILED: That run didn't finish cleanly. We'll try again.
ERR_INTERNAL: Something small went wrong. Please try again.
deleteSuccess: Alarm removed. You can always create a new one.
pauseSuccess: All alarms paused. You can resume anytime.
resumeSuccess: All alarms are back on duty.
logsHint: See how your alarms have been doing
